# Professor priority notes (annotated)

The instructor flagged Module 4 harmonic functions and Green function as a definite midterm and final exam coverage area. This was based on the comment during the March 14 lecture where the instructor said "I want you all to be very comfortable with the Green function construction on the disk and half-plane before the midterm."

Other topics with strong signals:
- Method of characteristics from Module 1 was emphasised three times across lecture notes
- Heat equation similarity solutions from Module 5 was called out as a possible bonus question

Topics that the instructor explicitly de-emphasised:
- Sturm-Liouville theory (no past-paper question in last 5 years)
- Series solutions of ODEs (covered in PDE 301 prerequisite)

Use these signals to allocate revision time, but do not represent any topic as guaranteed unless previous-year frequency or instructor priority both support it.
